/usr/bin/g++-11  -Wnon-virtual-dtor -frounding-math -ffp-contract=off -fopenmp -fPIC -fvisibility=hidden -m64 -O3 -DNDEBUG -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2  -Wl,--no-undefined CMakeFiles/test_RVC.dir/main.cpp.o -o ../../../bin/test_RVC   -L/home/shadeform/cudageom/geogram-cuda/build_cuda/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/shadeform/cudageom/geogram-cuda/build_cuda/lib -lm -lpthread ../../../lib/libgeogram.so.1.9.9-rc -lpthread -ldl
